items.title: NFL players continue push for grass fields on heels of World Cup
items.summary: Dozens of NFL players are continuing their push for the installment of permanent grass playing surfaces across the league after it was used successfully for World Cup matches at 11 league stadiums.

items.title: Ethan Pocic signing 1-year deal with Ravens, sources say
items.summary: Former Cleveland Browns center Ethan Pocic is signing a one-year deal with the Baltimore Ravens, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

items.title: NFL suspends Cardinals executive for violating gambling policy
items.summary: The NFL has suspended Arizona Cardinals personnel executive Ryan Gold indefinitely for violating the league's gambling policy.

items.title: Titans to induct former RB Chris Johnson into Ring of Honor
items.summary: The Titans are going to induct former running back Chris Johnson into their ring of honor.

items.title: Fantasy football buzz: Why drafting Jonathan Taylor carries risk
items.summary: Liz Loza gives a history lesson to explain why the Colts' star could disappoint fantasy managers this season.

items.title: What does C.J. Stroud need to prove this season?
items.summary: What does C.J. Stroud need to prove this season?
